title: The Whop Store Guide + 500 Examples
hook: The step-by-step guide to launching a Whop store this week, paired with 512 real stores cataloged across 20 niches so you can copy what is already working. Build the offer, anchor the price, ship the launch, and steal the patterns from the operators already winning.
benefits: The 5-question niche filter. Find a Whop niche you can actually ship in 7 days. Pulls from the 20-niche map so you anchor against real demand, not guesses, and pick a niche with paying buyers and visible price ceilings.
Whop store setup, end to end. Registration, brand kit, the about page that converts, and the 3-tier structure (free / commitment / outcome) that almost every winning store on the index runs.

The 6 monetization shapes decoded with real store URLs. Signals, community, course, newsletter, coaching cohort, and hybrid. For each: pricing, cadence, what subscribers actually get, and which shape fits your skill set.

Pricing that anchors against the data. The $19 starter zone, the $47 to $97 commitment zone, the $197 to $497 outcome zone, the $997+ premium zone. Pick your tier by what your nearest competitors in the index already charge.

The 20-niche map. For each niche: store count, 2 to 5 standout examples lifted from the data with actual titles and URLs, typical price point, the buyer profile, and the cleanest entry play if you start from zero.

The 60-day launch plan. Week 1 niche selection. Weeks 3-4 store build. Weeks 5-6 first 50 paying members organically. Weeks 7-8 pricing iteration and retention systems. KPI targets for each milestone.

The 512-store index. Every URL, every title, a one-line description for each. Sliced by niche so you can open the closest 10 competitors in tabs and run the pattern-copy framework on them inside an hour.

Bonus data files. The full index as a downloadable spreadsheet, the top 50 stores worth studying, and the 5-step pattern-copy framework you can run on any store in any niche to reverse-engineer what is working.
squeezeBullets: The build guide: niche pick, store setup, pricing, launch, and 60-day retention plan
The vault: 512 real Whop stores indexed across 20 niches with URLs, titles, and one-liners
The takeaway: copy what is already converting instead of guessing your way to a launch
description:
The cheapest market research and the cheapest playbook for productized communities in 2026. The build guide walks you from a blank niche pick to your first 50 paying members in 60 days. The 512-store index is a downloadable spreadsheet so you can open your nearest 10 competitors in tabs and copy the patterns that are already converting. Two layers, one playbook.

Nine parts, no theory padding. Built for solo founders considering launching a Whop store, agency operators studying productized communities, and indie hackers looking for inspiration on what to sell.

Part 1, The Whop Economy in 2026. What Whop is, why it became the default surface for productized communities by mid-2024, the price floor (free), the price ceiling (~$1K+/month for premium masterminds), what you can sell on it (Discord/Telegram access, courses, signals, software, coaching, newsletters, hybrids), and why founders pick it over Skool, Circle, or a Discord+Stripe duct-tape build.

Part 2, How to Build Your Own Whop Store. The step-by-step. The 5-question niche filter. Pre-launch positioning (name + 1-line promise + free funnel content). Whop store setup including brand kit, about page, and the 3-tier pricing structure. Pricing your offer using the 500-store index as the comparison set. Daily, weekly, and monthly content cadence. Launch tactics for the first 50 members. Retention setup on a 30/60/90 cadence. When to scale to a second tier or a sister store. Each step references the index data so you anchor against reality.

Part 3, What 512 Real Whop Stores Tell Us. The meta-patterns. Three niches own ~30% of volume (Trading 59, Self-Improvement 54, Niche/Hobby 44). Six monetization shapes cover almost every store. Pricing clusters at six anchors ($19, $47-ish, $97, $197, $497, $997+). Trading and Self-Improvement are not the same demographic. Community/Mastermind is the most format-flexible niche. Creator/Content is dominated by faceless YouTube and short-form clipping.

Part 4, The 6 Monetization Shapes Decoded. For each shape: where it lives, how it works, price range, cadence, what subscribers get, real example URLs lifted from the index, and what the winners are doing right. Paid signals (Trading + Sports Betting). Paid community (Self-Improvement + Niche). Paid course (AI Tools + Education + Ecommerce). Paid newsletter (small on Whop, lives on Substack). Paid coaching cohort (Agency + Self-Improvement). Hybrid course+community (the highest-LTV shape in the data).

Part 5, The 20-Niche Map. For each of the 20 niches: store count, 2 to 5 standout examples lifted from the data with their actual titles and URLs, the typical price point, the buyer profile, and the cleanest entry play if you are starting in that niche. Trading. Self-Improvement. Niche/Hobby. Community/Mastermind. Creator/Content. Fitness. SEO/Marketing. Side Hustle. Crypto/Web3. AI Tools. Coding/Dev. Ecommerce. Sports Betting. Agency/SMMA. Real Estate. Course/Education. Tech/Dev. Copywriting. Adult/OF Agency. Newsletter/Substack.

Part 6, The 'How to Copy a Winning Pattern' Framework. Five steps to study any successful Whop store and extract the pattern. Identify the promise, the format, the cadence, the price anchor, and the trust signal. Worked example walking the framework through whop.com/the-prop-firm-protocol step by step.

Part 7, Pricing Patterns Across the 512 Stores. Four pricing zones with the buyer mindset and risk profile of each. The $19 starter zone (impulse-buy, high-churn, audition pricing). The $47 to $97 commitment zone (most stores cluster here, most crowded). The $197 to $497 outcome zone (price signals seriousness, needs strong proof). The $997+ premium zone (small-cohort masterminds, the price IS the marketing). The free-tier-as-funnel pattern that almost every successful operator runs.

Part 8, The Top 50 Stores Worth Studying. Distilled list of 50 stores worth opening in a tab and studying, picked across niches for variety. For each: URL, title, and the one-line takeaway about what they're doing right. From Day Trading With Source to The Higher Brotherhood to Faceless OS to DEALFORGE Real Estate to Whop Academy itself.

Part 9, The 60-Day Whop Store Launch Plan. Week-by-week sequence to get from zero to first 50 paying members. Weeks 1-2 niche selection and offer spec. Weeks 3-4 build the store and pre-load content. Weeks 5-6 first 50 paying members organically. Weeks 7-8 pricing iteration and retention systems. Day 60 honest self-audit with KPI targets and the diagnostic for what to fix if you're below 50 paying members.

Included as a printable PDF, a duplicatable Notion reference, and the full 512-store index as a downloadable spreadsheet with every URL, title, and one-line description. Built to be opened on a Saturday morning by a founder considering launching a productized community and turned into a launch plan by Sunday night.
emailSubject: Your Whop Store Guide + 500 Examples is ready
